comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.bilibili.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bilibili.com%2F) ### Comment > The website will display channel recommendations in the last column. However, when randomly appearing ads are blocked, the channel recommendations may appear in any column randomly, disturbing the visual layout. > > Hope to revert to the previous ad block placeholder, and block the ad block prompt above. ``` Username: @TatleCat ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/migyneao8hwkkgk8go0ksgcwgo4so48okigtchb32s.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/hwb5be6sda0wkco84csws8k4cgoww44fxmc76uywio.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 3 ![Screenshot 3](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/awwskuoefz4gccswsoko4c4wsw4sswoc5vqn9627b4.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/cipnlryx2vscw8swkswsks0csgs8oscbpdvwdnncps.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.0.8 MV2 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Edge Tracking protection: | disabled Filters: | Ad blocking:

issue.title: cizgivedizi.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://cizgivedizi.com/dizi/sb/sungerbob_karepantolon/1/eleman_araniyor__resif_Copleri__agac_kubbesinde_Cay#](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcizgivedizi.com%2Fdizi%2Fsb%2Fsungerbob_karepantolon%2F1%2Feleman_araniyor__resif_Copleri__agac_kubbesinde_Cay%23) ### Comment > This website, and indeed the entire site, opens an advertisement in a new tab whenever you tap anywhere except the video player. (This applies to the entire website, not just this example page.) ``` Username: @odis2277 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/gzya6gk519ckoook0wkos08gsc88sko51yono8nvh0.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3nsw4en1hd4w4so4gkc844gsogws44k13pwrtd5zne.png?nc=1)

comment.body:
Hi, it's fixed at https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/9eb3366249dc70391a9d58043bdce757954e9df8 . Unfortunately, MV3 extension cannot update filters due to Google policy, so new rules will be available in one of the next extension updates.

In the meantime, please try adding this as a custom rule to user rules:

```adblock
cizgivedizi.com#%#//scriptlet('prevent-window-open')
```
